payload.concept: Runtime Tasks (ephemeral, execution steps) vs Code Tasks (persistent, feature requests)
payload.notes: Explain that Runtime Tasks are what the agent uses to keep track of its own work within a loop (like a checklist), while Code Tasks are the actual software engineering goals provided by the user.
